seeds.label: dmiss_BFC14A54
seeds.rationale: dispatch miss (Beetle wtrace, docs/CASE_A_AOT_GAP.md): chain BUSY-writer at RAM 0x4F54; alias rule RAM=ROM-0xBFC10000+0x500. Reached via JAL inside FUN_bfc147f4; never emitted as standalone entry.

seeds.label: dmiss_BFC158D0
seeds.rationale: dispatch miss (Beetle wtrace, docs/CASE_A_AOT_GAP.md): chain init slot-0 BUSY writer at RAM 0x5DD0; alias RAM=ROM-0xBFC10000+0x500. Inside FUN_bfc158a8 body.

seeds.label: dmiss_BFC158D8
seeds.rationale: dispatch miss (Beetle wtrace, docs/CASE_A_AOT_GAP.md): chain init slot-1 BUSY writer at RAM 0x5DD8; alias RAM=ROM-0xBFC10000+0x500. Inside FUN_bfc158a8 body.

seeds.label: dmiss_BFC159F4
seeds.rationale: dispatch miss (Beetle wtrace, docs/CASE_A_AOT_GAP.md): chain step handler that writes 0x02 OPEN to [0x7568+slot] at RAM 0x5EF4. Indirect-jr target from RAM 0x6c98 jump table; alias RAM=ROM-0xBFC10000+0x500. KEY entry â€” without this the gate never clears.

seeds.label: dmiss_BFC15AA8
seeds.rationale: dispatch miss (Beetle wtrace, docs/CASE_A_AOT_GAP.md): chain step handler that writes 0x04 OPEN to [0x7568+slot] at RAM 0x5FA8. Indirect-jr target from RAM 0x6c98 jump table; alias RAM=ROM-0xBFC10000+0x500. KEY entry â€” paired with 0xBFC159F4.

seeds.label: dmiss_BFC04910
seeds.rationale: Tomba boot dispatch miss after licensed PlayStation screen. Verified in Ghidra/runtime disassembly as a standalone BIOS init routine between 0xBFC048D0 and 0xBFC04ABC, with return at 0xBFC04A98 and table data reference from 0xBFC04554.

seeds.label: dmiss_BFC04850
seeds.rationale: Tomba boot dispatch miss after seeding 0xBFC04910. Verified in Ghidra/runtime disassembly as a standalone BIOS callback-list init routine between 0xBFC0472C and 0xBFC048D0, with return at 0xBFC048C8 and table data reference from 0xBFC04588.

seeds.label: dmiss_BFC079F8
seeds.rationale: Tomba boot dispatch miss after game callback coverage fixes. Verified in Ghidra as a tiny BIOS table leaf routine (sw a0,0(sp); jr ra; clear v0) referenced by data at 0xBFC04484 and 0xBFC0E30C.

seeds.label: dmiss_BFC15F1C
seeds.rationale: dirty_ram hot: SIO/PAD interrupt handler entry point (RAM 0x641C), called via jalr. 10852+ hits/frame across internal branch targets (0x641C, 0x6430, 0x6444, 0x6458, 0x650C, 0x6514, 0x658C, 0x6594). Seeding entry only; CFG discovers internal labels.

seeds.label: cache_flush_continuation

seeds.label: SysInitMemory
seeds.rationale: Dispatch miss during boot â€” kernel init function

seeds.label: card_copy_dispatch_miss_2026_05_05
seeds.rationale: Runtime dispatch miss: 8 hits during YES/NO COPY confirm execution. BANDAID per user permission.

seeds.label: indirect_BFC06FDC
seeds.rationale: Reached via indirect dispatch during boot

seeds.label: card_cmd_is_not_read
seeds.rationale: 3-instruction predicate function: xori $v0,$a0,0x52; jr $ra; sltu $v0,$0,$v0. Returns ($a0 != 0x52 READ). Sibling of 0xBFC0989C.

seeds.label: card_cmd_is_not_write_2026_05_09
seeds.rationale: 3-instruction predicate function: xori $v0,$a0,0x51; jr $ra; sltu $v0,$0,$v0. Returns ($a0 != 0x51 WRITE). Sibling of 0xBFC09890. Discovery missed it because it sits between 0xBFC09898 (end of 0xBFC09890) and 0xBFC098A8 (next discovered fn). Called via JALR at 0xBFC09788 in func_1FC09598 â€” without this seed, JALR dispatches to unknown, write predicate returns junk via uninitialized v0, BIOS COPY silently no-ops the SIO write protocol (60 misses per copy, no 0x57 ever sent). Earlier bisect (2026-05-05) said this crashed; that was before the predicate-init fix and dispatch-miss class fixes. Retry 2026-05-09.

seeds.label: kernel_5A58
seeds.rationale: CARD read chain state 12 (data-byte-store): SIO_RX -> a1[0x7F], XOR-updates checksum at 0x7560+slot*4, returns v0=0. Targeted by jump table at RAM 0x6c98 entry 12.

seeds.label: kernel_5AB0
seeds.rationale: CARD read chain state 13 (data-loop completion): reads byte vs checksum at 0x7560+slot*4, polls SIO_STAT for RX_RDY, reads END byte; v0=1 if 'G' else v0=-1. Targeted by jump table at RAM 0x6c98 entry 13.

seeds.label: modal_stub_dispatch_miss
seeds.rationale: Runtime dispatch miss confirmed 2026-05-05: psx_unknown_dispatch hit during YES/NO COPY confirm modal CROSS press. Beetle wtrace+fntrace shows this PC fires on modal close via JAL caller_pc=0x8004673C. Ghidra function discovery missed it. BANDAID per user permission â€” should be replaced by an improved heuristic that catches this gap.

seeds.label: shell_hot_function
seeds.rationale: Dispatch miss at 0x80050AF0 (phys 0x1FC38AF0) â€” 178 misses. Hot shell function during rendering loop.

seeds.label: shell_3d_callback_BFC41D18
seeds.rationale: DuckStation oracle TCB saved PC - shell 3D rendering callback

seeds.label: dispatch_miss_0xBFC41DC8
seeds.rationale: Phase 4.5 dispatch miss from 3D rendering seeds

seeds.label: shell_3d_callback_BFC41DFC
seeds.rationale: DuckStation oracle TCB saved EPC - shell 3D rendering

seeds.label: dispatch_miss_0xBFC41E14
seeds.rationale: Phase 4.5 dispatch miss from 3D rendering seeds

seeds.label: shell_InitRCnt_setup
seeds.rationale: Undiscovered function: calls B0:0x15 (InitRCnt) with arg 0x20000001. Only reachable via indirect jalr from shell init table. Missing seed causes VSync counter to never increment.

seeds.label: shell_vblank_restore_entry
seeds.rationale: Mid-function entry: SaveState/RestoreState (A0:0x13/0x14) longjmp target inside func_1FC42160; after RestoreState returns v0!=0 the callback loop runs

seeds.label: shell_vblank_callback_loop
seeds.rationale: Mid-function entry point inside func_1FC42160. The BIOS shell jumps here directly to walk VBlank callbacks, bypassing the init-gate at the function top. Needed for VSync counter increment.

seeds.label: shell_42308
seeds.rationale: Shell function near VSync callback area. Dispatch miss from input path.

seeds.label: shell_vblank_init_body
seeds.rationale: Mid-function entry: SaveState returns v0=0 â†’ BEQ at 0xBFC421D8 taken â†’ callback table setup at 0xBFC4231C. Split from func_1FC42160

seeds.label: shell_vblank_epilogue
seeds.rationale: Mid-function entry: func_1FC42160 epilogue (restore ra/sp, return). Branch target from BNE at 0xBFC4216C when init flag is set

seeds.label: vblank_chain_handler
seeds.rationale: VBlank chain handler: the ONLY instruction in the entire BIOS ROM that stores to 0x80079D9C (VSync counter) is at 0xBFC425E0, inside this 15-instruction function at 0xBFC425BC. Function reads counter, increments it, optionally calls user callback at *0x800DFF40. Not reachable via any JAL/literal/lui in ROM â€” installed at runtime by kernel chain-registration code. Missing seed means counter-increment code is never recompiled, so even if kernel installs the handler pointer it cannot dispatch to recompiled code.

seeds.label: trampoline_BFC428D0
seeds.rationale: audit-detected dispatch miss — A0/B0/C0 syscall trampoline

seeds.label: trampoline_BFC428E0
